languages.text: "При всем уважении к вашему святейшему предку, сейчас от его приказов толку чуть. Оставьте себе, это же ваше наследие".
"With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."
languages.original_text: "При всем уважении к вашему святейшему предку, сейчас от его приказов толку чуть. Оставьте себе, это же ваше наследие".

traits.locale_text: "With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep it — after all, it is your legacy."
"With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep it — after all, it is your legacy."
"With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."
"With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."
"With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."

languages.text: "Bei allem Respekt für Euren hochheiligen Ahnherrn, seine Befehle sind mittlerweile nutzlos. Behaltet sie ... es ist schließlich Euer Vermächtnis."
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."

traits.locale_text: "Bei allem Respekt für Euren hochheiligen Ahnherrn, seine Befehle sind mittlerweile nutzlos. Behaltet sie ... es ist schließlich Euer Vermächtnis."

languages.text: « Avec tout le respect que je dois à votre très saint ancêtre, ses ordres ne nous sont plus d'aucune utilité, à présent. Gardez-les. Après tout, il s'agit de votre héritage. »
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."

traits.locale_text: « Avec tout le respect que je dois à votre très saint ancêtre, ses ordres ne nous sont plus d'aucune utilité, à présent. Gardez-les. Après tout, il s'agit de votre héritage. »

languages.text: «Con el debido respeto a su bendito ancestro, ahora sus órdenes no tienen ninguna validez. Guárdelas; después de todo, son su legado».
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."

traits.locale_text: «Con el debido respeto a su bendito ancestro, ahora sus órdenes no tienen ninguna validez. Guárdelas; después de todo, son su legado».

languages.text: "Kutsal atanıza saygısızlık etmemekle birlikte onun emirleri artık geçerli değil. Sizde kalsınlar... Neticede mirasınız."
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal atanıza saygısızlık etmemekle birlikte onun emirleri artık geçerli değil. Sizde kalsınlar... Neticede mirasınız."

languages.text: “对您那位至高无上的先祖，我无意不敬，但他的命令现在已经没什么用了。您自己留着吧——那毕竟是您的遗产。”
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."

traits.locale_text: “对您那位至高无上的先祖，我无意不敬，但他的命令现在已经没什么用了。您自己留着吧——那毕竟是您的遗产。”

languages.text: 「最も神聖な祖先様への敬意を払って言うならば、祖先様の命令は今となっては役に立ちません。大切に保管してください。それはあなたの遺産です。」
languages.original_text: "With all due respect to your most holy ancestor, his orders are of little use now. Keep them — after all, it is your legacy."

traits.locale_text: 「最も神聖な祖先様への敬意を払って言うならば、祖先様の命令は今となっては役に立ちません。大切に保管してください。それはあなたの遺産です。」
